c.d: The total number of active users or downloads, indicating the app's popularity and network reach.
The supported operating systems or devices (e.g., Android, iOS, Browser) on which the app can run.
Options available for creators to earn money, such as virtual gifting, ads, subscriptions, sponsorships.
The maximum resolution or streaming quality supported by the app.
Types of audience interaction during streaming, including chat, multi-guest live, live PK, gifts, polls.
How simple it is to start broadcasting live with minimal setup and user-friendly UI.
Advanced live streaming tools such as multi-camera support, real-time editing, branding customization.
